name: Ontology
description: Instance-local. User-defined entity types, templates, materialized views, domain records. This layer is NEVER copied by spawn — it belongs to the running instance only. Agents and users operate here.
invariants: this layer contains only entity records, not code
no PHP files at this layer
records here may reference capabilities (layer 03) but not implement them
this layer is the only layer that changes during normal instance operation
